quicksight.dataset.s3source.DataSourceAr.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the data source.

quicksight.dataset.s3source.InputColumns.Docs: A physical table type for an S3 data source.  For files that aren't JSON, only `STRING` data types are supported in input columns.

quicksight.dataset.s3source.UploadSettin.Docs: Information about the format for the S3 source file or files.
